name: Acorn Squash with Sliced Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the squash in half and remove the seeds.
2. Place the cut side down in a shallow greased baking dish and add 1/2 cup boiling water.
3. Cover and bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
4. Remove from the oven and cover.
5. Turn the squash cut side up.
6. Sprinkle with salt.
7. Peel and core the apples, then cut into wedges.
8. Fill the squash cavities with apples and dot generously with butter.
9. Sprinkle each squash half with 1 tablespoon brown sugar, then a little nutmeg.
10. Pour 1/2 cup boiling water into the baking dish.
11. Bake for 30 minutes or until the squash and apples are tender.
Yield: 6 servings.
